name: FileViewer
description: Universal file preview — auto-detects type from MIME / extension and renders PDF, images, video, audio, Markdown, JSON, CSV, source code (CodeMirror), and plain text inline; unknown types fall back to a download CTA. Pluggable per-kind renderer overrides; auth-aware HttpClient hook.

api.name: FileViewer
api.description: Universal file preview — auto-detects type from MIME / extension and renders PDF, images, video, audio, Markdown, JSON, CSV, source code (CodeMirror), and plain text inline; unknown types fall back to a download CTA. Pluggable per-kind renderer overrides; auth-aware HttpClient hook.

parameters.name: Kind
parameters.description: Override detection with an explicit kind. Default Auto.

parameters.name: MimeType
parameters.description: Explicit MIME type from your backend (e.g. "application/pdf"). Wins over HEAD and extension detection but loses to an explicit Kind override.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: Human-readable file name. Used for the toolbar label, the download attribute, and the aria-label. Falls back to the last URL path segment when not provided.

parameters.name: AutoHead
parameters.description: Issue a HEAD request to inspect Content-Type when neither Kind nor MimeType is set. Off by default because many CDNs and signed URLs reject HEAD with 405 / 403.

parameters.name: MaxBytes
parameters.description: Cap on the number of bytes fetched for text-based kinds (Markdown, Code, JSON, CSV, Text). Default 10 MB. Excess content is truncated and a one-line notice is appended.

parameters.name: MaxCsvRows
parameters.description: Cap on the number of CSV rows rendered. Default 1000.

parameters.name: ShowToolbar
parameters.description: Show the top toolbar (file name + download). Default true.

parameters.name: ShowDownload
parameters.description: Show the download button in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowFileName
parameters.description: Show the file name in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: HttpClient
parameters.description: Plug a custom HttpClient for the text fetches. Use this to attach a pre-configured Authorization handler instead of mutating the default client. Highest precedence — wins over HttpClientName, DI, and the factory.

parameters.name: HttpClientName
parameters.description: Name of the client to pull from a DI-registered IHttpClientFactory for the text fetches (Markdown/Code/JSON/CSV/Text). When the factory is registered (the common case once AddHttpClient() has been called) this is the recommended way to get a correctly-pooled client and avoid socket exhaustion. Ignored when an explicit HttpClient is supplied. Null/empty uses the factory's default client.

parameters.name: EnableOfficeOnlineViewer
parameters.description: Show an "Open in viewer" action on the Office-document fallback panel that opens the file in the Microsoft Office web viewer. Off by default because it sends the document URL to a Microsoft endpoint and only works for publicly reachable absolute http(s) URLs.

parameters.name: ConfigureRequest
parameters.description: Hook to mutate the outgoing HttpRequestMessage before it's sent — typical use is adding an Authorization header for signed-but-not-presigned URLs.

parameters.name: CustomRenderers
parameters.description: Per-kind renderer overrides. The fragment receives a FileViewerRenderContext with the resolved URL, kind, the fetched text (when applicable) and the display name. When provided for a given kind, the built-in renderer is bypassed for that kind.

parameters.name: LoadingTemplate
parameters.description: Custom loading view. Default is a centered Spinner.

parameters.name: OnKindDetected
parameters.description: Fires once detection settles, with the resolved kind.

parameters.name: OnLoaded
parameters.description: Fires when the file is fully rendered (text fetched, if any).

parameters.name: OnError
parameters.description: Fires on any detection or fetch error, with a message.

events.name: OnKindDetected
events.description: Fires once detection settles, with the resolved kind.

events.name: OnLoaded
events.description: Fires when the file is fully rendered (text fetched, if any).

events.name: OnError
events.description: Fires on any detection or fetch error, with a message.

enums.name: FileKind
enums.description: Kind of content FileViewer renders. Drives which renderer is invoked and which icon / aria-label is shown in the toolbar. Auto is the default and triggers detection from MIME / extension / HEAD content-type; everything else short-circuits detection.

slots.name: LoadingTemplate
slots.description: Custom loading view. Default is a centered Spinner.

mdSummary:
# FileViewer

Universal file preview — auto-detects type from MIME / extension and renders PDF, images, video, audio, Markdown, JSON, CSV, source code (CodeMirror), and plain text inline; unknown types fall back to a download CTA. Pluggable per-kind renderer overrides; auth-aware HttpClient hook.

**Package:** `Lumeo.FileViewer` · **Category:** Data Display
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/file-viewer

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| FileViewer | Src | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileViewer | Kind | `FileKind` | `FileKind.Auto` | Override detection with an explicit kind. Default Auto. |
| FileViewer | MimeType | `string?` | `` | Explicit MIME type from your backend (e.g. "application/pdf"). Wins over HEAD and extension detection but loses to an explicit Kind override. |
| FileViewer | FileName | `string?` | `` | Human-readable file name. Used for the toolbar label, the download attribute, and the aria-label. Falls back to the last URL path segment when not provided. |
| FileViewer | AutoHead | `bool` | `` | Issue a HEAD request to inspect Content-Type when neither Kind nor MimeType is set. Off by default because many CDNs and signed URLs reject HEAD with 405 / 403. |
| FileViewer | MaxBytes | `long` | `10L * 1024 * 1024` | Cap on the number of bytes fetched for text-based kinds (Markdown, Code, JSON, CSV, Text). Default 10 MB. Excess content is truncated and a one-line notice is appended. |
| FileViewer | MaxCsvRows | `int` | `1000` | Cap on the number of CSV rows rendered. Default 1000. |
| FileViewer | ShowToolbar | `bool` | `true` | Show the top toolbar (file name + download). Default true. |
| FileViewer | ShowDownload | `bool` | `true` | Show the download button in the toolbar. Default true. |
| FileViewer | ShowFileName | `bool` | `true` | Show the file name in the toolbar. Default true. |
| FileViewer | HttpClient | `HttpClient?` | `` | Plug a custom HttpClient for the text fetches. Use this to attach a pre-configured Authorization handler instead of mutating the default client. Highest precedence — wins over HttpClientName, DI, and the factory. |
| FileViewer | HttpClientName | `string?` | `` | Name of the client to pull from a DI-registered IHttpClientFactory for the text fetches (Markdown/Code/JSON/CSV/Text). When the factory is registered (the common case once AddHttpClient() has been called) this is the recommended way to get a correctly-pooled client and avoid socket exhaustion. Ignored when an explicit HttpClient is supplied. Null/empty uses the factory's default client. |
| FileViewer | EnableOfficeOnlineViewer | `bool` | `` | Show an "Open in viewer" action on the Office-document fallback panel that opens the file in the Microsoft Office web viewer. Off by default because it sends the document URL to a Microsoft endpoint and only works for publicly reachable absolute http(s) URLs. |
| FileViewer | ConfigureRequest | `Func<HttpRequestMessage, Task>?` | `` | Hook to mutate the outgoing HttpRequestMessage before it's sent — typical use is adding an Authorization header for signed-but-not-presigned URLs. |
| FileViewer | CustomRenderers | `IReadOnlyDictionary<FileKind, RenderFragment<FileViewerRenderContext>>?` | `` | Per-kind renderer overrides. The fragment receives a FileViewerRenderContext with the resolved URL, kind, the fetched text (when applicable) and the display name. When provided for a given kind, the built-in renderer is bypassed for that kind. |
| FileViewer | LoadingTemplate | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom loading view. Default is a centered Spinner. |
| FileViewer | OnKindDetected | `EventCallback<FileKind>` | `` | Fires once detection settles, with the resolved kind. |
| FileViewer | OnLoaded | `EventCallback` | `` | Fires when the file is fully rendered (text fetched, if any). |
| FileViewer | OnError | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Fires on any detection or fetch error, with a message. |
| FileViewer | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileViewer | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `LoadingTemplate` (FileViewer) — Custom loading view. Default is a centered Spinner.

## Events
- `OnKindDetected` (`EventCallback<FileKind>`) — Fires once detection settles, with the resolved kind.
- `OnLoaded` (`EventCallback`) — Fires when the file is fully rendered (text fetched, if any).
- `OnError` (`EventCallback<string>`) — Fires on any detection or fetch error, with a message.

## Sub-components
- (none)

- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

